headline: Trump 🍊 Double-Dips Iran Off-Ramps 🚗💨🔥
text:
Trump 🍊👑 the ORANGE DADDY 🧡🐸 is JUGGLING 🔥🤹‍♂️ TWO OFF-RAMPS 🚗💥 with IRAN 🕌😡 like a CHAOTIC TECHNO RAVE 👾💨! White House simps 🤡📢 swear he's DICTATING 🎤👊 the whole MIDEAST MELEE 🥊🌍, but even GOP bros 🐘😩 are SALTY 🧂💦 over MIXED MESSAGING 📡🤷‍♂️ on WAR AIMS 🎯💣. One sec he's WINDING DOWN 🌀😌 the beef, next he's UNLEASHING HELL 🔥👹 per Press Sec Karoline Leavitt 💅📢 – 'No BLUFFS 💨, Iran don't MIS-CALCULATE 🧠❌ or get SLAPPED HARDER THAN EVER 🖐️💥!' 

Tuesday TWIN MOVES 🤝⚔️: Pentagon DROPS 1,000+ PARATROOPERS 🪂🍆 from 82nd Airborne to IRAN SOIL 🇮🇷🪖, while negotiators SLIDE a THICC 15-POINT PEACE PLAN 📜🍑 to Tehran mullahs 🕌👳! Demands? NIX NUKES ☢️🚫, CAP BALLISTIC DONGLES 🚀🍆, REOPEN STRAIT OF HORMUZ 🚢⛴️ for 20% GLOBAL OIL GO-JUICE 🛢️💦 – or else! Jared Kushner 🕶️💼 and Steve Witkoff 🧔📈 recycling their GAZA/UKRAINE 🕎🇺🇦 multi-point BANGER PLANS 🔄📝 that got TWEAKED mid-NEGOTIATION 💋🤝. Trump PAUSED 48-HOUR ESCALATION ⏸️⚠️ for 5-DAY 'MAJOR PROGRESS' 🥳📈, but Iran YEETS it back 🚫😤: 'We END WAR WHEN WE SAY 👑, OUR TERMS ONLY 🕌💪!' FM Abbas Araghchi 🗣️🇮🇷 on state TV: 'NO TALKS 🤐, NO HORMUZ PASS FOR ENEMY SHIPS 🚢🚫 – y'all STAY BLOCKED 😏!'

GOP SPLIT 🐘💔 like a BAD DIVORCE 👰‍♀️🚫: House Speaker Mike Johnson 🙌 says 'WRAPPING UP SOON 🥇📦!', but Nancy Mace 🔥🇺🇸 RAGE-POSTS on X 🐦💥: 'NO BOOTS ON IRAN GROUND 🪖❌ post-briefing – HARD PASS 😡!' Mike Rogers 📡 complains Pentagon STINGY on DEETS 🤐📋. MAGA ANTI-WAR CUCKS 🐔🕊️ vs HAWK SIMPS 🦅💣 TEARING PARTY APART 😩🔥 ahead of MIDTERMS 🗳️😱. Even Bush-era Hadley 🧓📈 DUNKS: 'HORMUZ PROBLEM 🚢😩 – can't CLAIM VICTORY if Iran OWNS IT 🕌🏆, and NO NATO BROS 🛡️🇪🇺 cuz Trump GHOSTED CONSULTS 👻📞!'

Ex-officials SPILL TEA ☕💦: 'Trump ain't THOUGHT THIS THROUGH 🧠❓ – PICK-UP GAME 🏀😩 of WHATEVER UNITS READY NOW 🎲!' Miad Maleki 🛢️💼 hypes PARATROOPERS seizing KHARG ISLAND 🏝️🇮🇷 for OIL HUB LEVERAGE 🍑🔑, but RISKY AF ⚠️😬 for US BOYS 🪖💦. Jason Campbell 🛡️🤨 calls it NO-STRATEGY CHAOS 🎭💥 – Strait attacks SPIKED OIL PRICES 📈🛢️💰, global economy ROILED 🌎😵‍💫! Iran flexes 'WE CONTROL TOO 👊🕌' despite Trump 'WE WON ALREADY 🏆🍊!' White House BETS ground game PRESSURES surrender 🤞🙏, but Tehran like 'HOLD MY NUCLEAR AMBITIONS ☢️😏' – head-spinning TANGO 💃🕺 in Persian Gulf 🪝🌊! Will Orange Man 🍊 MAGA this MESS into PEACE OR PULP? 🚀💥 Stay TUNED 📺🔥!
